params.name: Minerva' Broken Helmet
params.description: This battered helmet belonged to the Arcane God Minerva, the master of element power who controls the Hellenic Domain. Minerva dedicates herself to the teaching of magic. However, she was defeated in the fight against the snail before she could have enough students. This helmet, a symbol of the supreme status of a Demon God, was taken by the enemy and kept as a trophy.
